input.keyword: Frontend-backend API alignment audit after git pull (Laplace's Demon UI + local SSE/dataSource/fallback changes)
scope: New frontend features needing backend support

output.audit_summary: Core REST contracts for completed predictions and popular list are aligned. The largest gaps are in the real-mode SSE stream (poll-based endpoint emits only stage transitions until completion, missing queries/incremental report), failed-prediction error shape mismatch on GET, and featured-refresh lifecycle UX (stale cards during processing). Mock stream mode masks SSE gaps in default dev.

gaps.description: When status is 'failed', the page reads body.error?.message, but GET /api/predictions/[id] returns 200 with a PredictionDetail-shaped body (confidence.explanation holds the reason) and no top-level error object. Users see the generic fallback 'Prediction generation failed.' instead of the specific reason from markFailed().
gaps.fix: Either (A) extend getPrediction()/GET route to return { status: 'failed', error: { code: 'GENERATION_FAILED', message: detail.confidence.explanation } } for failed docs, or (B) update page.tsx to use body.confidence?.explanation || body.summary?.[0] when body.status === 'failed'. Prefer (A) for ApiErrorBody consistency.

gaps.description: SSE failed events always emit message: 'Prediction generation failed' (hardcoded) instead of the reason stored in ES (confidence.explanation from markFailed). The stream failure path loses actionable error text even though the frontend passes event.data.message to onFailed.
gaps.fix: When detail.status === 'failed', read detail.confidence.explanation (or summary[0]) and emit failed with that message. Mirror the same for stream timeout vs GENERATION_FAILED distinction.

gaps.description: Frontend live panel expects queries events to populate streamState.queries. Generator writes plan.subQueries to detail.progress.queries via updateProgress(), but the SSE route never reads or emits queries events during processing.
gaps.fix: Track lastQueryCount/hash in SSE poll loop; when detail.progress.queries changes, emit queries event. Include queries in initial snapshot built from current ES state (not hardcoded empty).

gaps.description: Mock stream emits progressive sources, outcomes, and report_delta events during processing. Real SSE only emits stage events while processing, then dumps sources/outcomes/report_delta once at completion. Live activity panel stays empty for most of a 1–2 minute real run.
gaps.fix: Short term: emit queries + stage from ES progress (above). Medium term: have prediction-generator persist partial sources/outcomes/report chunks to detail.progress and have SSE diff-emit them. Long term: pipe generator callbacks through Redis/pub-sub for true streaming.

gaps.description: SSE always opens with a hardcoded snapshot (stage: planning, empty arrays) even if ES already has progress at collecting_sources/estimating with queries populated. Causes brief UI regression until next poll detects stage change.
gaps.fix: Build initial snapshot from getPrediction(id) at stream start: map detail.progress.stage/message, detail.progress.queries, and any partial progress fields into PredictionStreamState.

gaps.description: Frontend stage ladder includes 'planning'. Generator's first updateProgress call is collecting_sources (after Gemini plan completes). Users never see the planning step in real mode unless SSE snapshot hardcodes it.
gaps.fix: Add updateProgress(id, 'planning', 'Planning focused research queries') at pipeline start before safeGenerateObject plan step.

gaps.description: SSE route lacks export const runtime = 'nodejs' while other prediction routes declare it. On Cloud Run/Edge this may prevent ES access or cause inconsistent deployment behavior (noted in cbcc462 deployment fixes).
gaps.fix: Add export const runtime = 'nodejs' and export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic' (already present) to events/route.ts.

gaps.description: listPopularPredictions filters featured + not-expired but not status=completed. During featured refresh (status→processing), cards may appear with stale outcomes from the previous detail blob while showing outdated Estimated/AI-verified badges.
gaps.fix: Filter popular list to status: completed OR exclude processing/failed. Optionally expose status on PredictionSummary so cards can show a 'Refreshing…' state.

gaps.description: createPrediction skeleton lacks detail.progress; getPrediction defaults to collecting_sources before generator's first updateProgress. Polling-only path skips 'planning' stage until SSE/mock provides it.
gaps.fix: Initialize skeleton with progress: { stage: 'planning', message: 'Starting prediction pipeline' } in createPrediction and refreshPrediction.

gaps.description: refreshPrediction spreads existing detail during processing and only sets data_source='real' after generation completes. Homepage cards keep seed label and old probabilities for 1–2 minutes during background refresh.
gaps.fix: On refresh start: set data_source to 'seed' explicitly or add status='processing' to summary; clear topOutcomes or show placeholder. Update data_source to 'real' atomically with completed detail write (already done in generator; remove redundant post-refresh update in refreshPrediction).

gaps.description: Backend POST /api/predictions/[id]/refresh is implemented and tested, but no frontend component exposes a refresh/re-run button on the detail page.
gaps.fix: Add refresh control to PredictionDetailView or PredictionHeader that POSTs refresh, navigates to processing state, and reconnects stream.

gaps.description: Backend supports ?category= filter (tested in predictions.api.test.ts) but homepage pagination never passes a category param. No category chips/tabs in UI.
gaps.fix: Add category filter UI on homepage; pass category to usePredictionPagination load() params when selected.

gaps.description: Only prediction-stream.state.test.ts covers the reducer. No API or Playwright test validates real SSE event sequencing, named EventSource listeners, or failed/completed terminal events from the backend route.
gaps.fix: Add predictions.events.api.test.ts using fetch with Accept: text/event-stream or Playwright route intercept; assert event order and payload shape for a mocked ES doc lifecycle.

gaps.description: PredictionCard shows Estimated vs AI-verified via dataSource, but PredictionDetail has no equivalent badge. dataSource lives on ES doc root, not in PredictionDetail type/GET response.
gaps.fix: Add dataSource?: PredictionDataSource to PredictionDetail (or include in GET wrapper) and render badge in detail header for parity with cards.

gaps.description: Several seed icons (smartphone, chart-candlestick, fuel, car-front, etc.) are not in PredictionCard icons map; cards fall back to Sparkles instead of semantic icons.
gaps.fix: Extend icons map in PredictionCard.tsx or normalize seed icons to the existing Lucide key set in prediction-seeds.ts.

gaps.description: NEXT_PUBLIC_PREDICTION_STREAM_MODE is read at build time (Next.js public env). Changing .env without rebuild leaves mock mode active despite .env.example defaulting to real.
gaps.fix: Document in deployment guide that rebuild is required after env change. Optionally add runtime config endpoint or server component prop to avoid build-time coupling.

aligned.note: Seeds (buildDetail) and generator output match PredictionDetailView fields: confidence, outcomes (id/rank/label/probability/change/rationale/sourceIds), sources (quality as ConfidenceLevel), summary, report, timestamps.
getPrediction returns { id, question, status: 'processing', progress: { stage, message }, updatedAt } matching page and ProgressView expectations.
GET /api/predictions/popular returns { items, nextCursor, hasMore } with limit=16 default; cursor encoding matches usePredictionPagination.
POST /api/predictions returns PredictionMutationResponse shape; useCreatePrediction handles error.body.error.message.

Backend emits event: <type>
data: <JSON PredictionStreamEvent>

 matching createRealClient EventSource listeners for all 8 event types.
errorResponse() returns ApiErrorBody consistently on popular, create, refresh, and not-found paths.
GET/POST /api/predictions/refresh-featured implemented; listStaleFeatured + batch refresh wired; AUTO_REFRESH_FEATURED background schedule on seed.
Default mock mode provides full progressive UX for dev/tests; real mode correctly targets /api/predictions/${id}/events when NEXT_PUBLIC_PREDICTION_STREAM_MODE=real.

execution_order.rationale: P0 — fix failed prediction UX on both polling and SSE paths before any stream enhancements
P1 quick wins — deployment safety + meaningful real-mode stream content with minimal generator changes
P1/P2 — deepen live activity fidelity during long-running real predictions
P1/P2 — homepage integrity during seed→real background refresh
P2 — expose existing backend capabilities in new UI surfaces
P2 — lock in stream contract before further generator refactors
